code: import React from'react';import{BACKEND_URL}from'./api';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const CATEGORIES=['자유','스터디','질문','정보','공고'];export const POSTS_PER_PAGE=5;export const MAX_PAGE_BUTTONS=5;export const inputStyle="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all";export const renderMedia=url=>{if(!url)return null;const fullUrl=url.startsWith('/')?`${BACKEND_URL}${url}`:url;const lowerUrl=fullUrl.toLowerCase();if(lowerUrl.match(/\.(jpeg|jpg|gif|png|webp)$/))return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:fullUrl,alt:"\uCCA8\uBD80 \uC774\uBBF8\uC9C0",className:"max-w-full h-auto rounded-xl shadow-sm mb-6 border border-gray-100"});if(lowerUrl.match(/\.(mp4|webm|mov)$/))return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("video",{controls:true,src:fullUrl,className:"max-w-full h-auto rounded-xl shadow-sm mb-6 bg-black"});if(lowerUrl.match(/\.(mp3|wav|ogg)$/))return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("audio",{controls:true,src:fullUrl,className:"w-full mb-6"});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:fullUrl,target:"_blank",rel:"noopener noreferrer",className:"inline-block px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 rounded-lg font-bold mb-6 transition-colors",children:"\uD83D\uDCCE \uCCA8\uBD80\uD30C\uC77C \uB2E4\uC6B4\uB85C\uB4DC"});};export const calculateDday=deadline=>{if(!deadline)return"";const today=new Date();today.setHours(0,0,0,0);const dDate=new Date(deadline);const diffTime=dDate-today;const diffDays=Math.ceil(diffTime/(1000*60*60*24));if(diffDays<0)return"마감";if(diffDays===0)return"D-Day";return`D-${diffDays}`;};
